channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 28.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer to face Commons grilling at PMQs as Streeting plans resignation speech – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer to face Commons grilling at PMQs as Streeting plans resignation speech – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil
item.description: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil

item.title: BBC Politics: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs
item.description: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs

item.title: Independent UK Politics: I worked for Andy Burnham – here’s why he would be a brilliant prime minister

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: New post:
Is Andy Burnham overrated?
Why are the Tories so relaxed about their dire election results?
Do the BBC give Farage an easy ride?
Answering lots of your questions.
(£/free trial)
samf.substack.com/p/is-...
item.description:

Why are the Tories so relaxed about their dire election results?
Do the BBC give Farage an easy ride?
Answering lots of your questions.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: An organisation's culture is set by its leader, Starmer dislikes making political arguments and has essentially convinced himself doing so is silly symbolism, so "persuasion" has dropped out of the government's mental...
item.description: An organisation's culture is set by its leader, Starmer dislikes making political arguments and has essentially convinced himself doing so is silly symbolism, so "persuasion" has dropped out of the government's mental...
